notFound.title: Project not found
notFound.description: The project may have been deleted or you don't have access.

skillsTab.title: Skills & Rules
skillsTab.description: Manage reusable skills and rules that shape how the AI works across your workspace.

projectDetails.title: Project Details
projectDetails.descriptionPlaceholder: A brief description of your project

integrationsTab.title: Integrations
integrationsTab.description: Connect third-party services and AI tools to extend your project.

githubSync.title: GitHub Sync
githubSync.description: Push and pull code changes to keep your project in sync.

github.title: GitHub Integration
github.description: Connect your project to GitHub for version control and collaboration.

notConnected.title: Not connected to GitHub
notConnected.description: Connect to push and pull code, track changes, and collaborate.
notConnected.hint: Use the GitHub button in the editor toolbar to connect this project.

pull.title: Pull from GitHub
pull.description: Download the latest changes from the remote repository.

disconnect.title: Disconnect Repository
disconnect.description: Removes the connection. Your code will not be deleted.

database.overviewDescription: A snapshot of your project database.
database.noTablesDescription: Ask the AI to add some — it will create your schema automatically.
database.schemaDescription: Tables, columns, indexes, and row-level security.
database.schemaEmpty: No tables found. Ask the AI to create your schema.
database.queriesDescription: Run SELECT / INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE against your database. Queries respect row-level security.
database.migrationsDescription: Applied migration history for your database.
database.noMigrationsDescription: Migrations appear here once the AI applies schema changes via the built-in database.
database.addIdentityColumnHint: add a created_by / owner_id column to enable RLS
database.noPoliciesRlsOn: No policies — RLS is on but no policy grants access (rows are hidden).
database.noPoliciesRlsOff: No policies — this table is not row-level-secured.
database.rowsDescription: Browse, edit, delete, and export table data.
database.noPkHint: Editing and deleting are disabled — this table has no single-column primary key to target rows by.
database.fillOneField: Fill at least one field before adding the row.
database.dropTablesDescription: Permanently delete a table and all its data. This cannot be undone.
database.resetDatabaseDescription: Drop ALL tables and start from an empty database. This cannot be undone.
database.typeResetToConfirm: Type reset to drop every table:

panel.title: MCP Servers
panel.description: Connect Model Context Protocol servers to give your AI assistant access to external tools and data.

stats.configured: {count, plural, one {# server configured} other {# servers configured}}

empty.title: No MCP servers configured
empty.description: MCP servers let your AI assistant use external tools like databases, APIs, file systems, and more.

streamableHttp.label: HTTP (Streamable)
streamableHttp.description: Connect to an HTTP-based MCP server with streaming support

httpSse.label: Server-Sent Events (SSE)
httpSse.description: Connect via HTTP with Server-Sent Events

oauth.connected: Connected successfully! You can close this form.
oauth.manualHint: Enter an access token manually, or enter the server URL above and click Discover to find the OAuth flow.
oauth.clientIdPlaceholder: Client ID if required by the server
oauth.clientIdHint: Some OAuth servers require a client ID. Leave empty if the server supports public clients.

envVars.label: Environment Variables
envVars.emptyHint: Optional. Passed to the stdio process via its environment.

errors.validUrl: Enter a valid URL to discover
errors.urlRequired: Server URL is required for HTTP transports
errors.commandRequired: Command is required for stdio transport
errors.oauthMetadataMissing: OAuth metadata not available. Enter the server URL and run discovery first.
errors.popupBlocked: Popup was blocked. Please allow popups for this site and try again.

notDetected.title: Server not auto-detected
notDetected.fallback: You can still add it manually — fill in the details below.

discovered.title: Server discovered
discovered.name: Name:
discovered.oauthEndpointFound: 🔗 OAuth endpoint discovered — use the "Connect with OAuth" button below to authorize
discovered.oauthManualFallback: OAuth metadata could not be auto-discovered. You can enter an access token manually below.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Skills teach the AI specific capabilities or knowledge. They are included in the AI's context when working on your projects.
skills.empty: No skills yet. Add one to teach the AI new capabilities.

rules.title: Rules
rules.description: Rules define constraints and conventions the AI must follow. File patterns control which files a rule applies to.
rules.empty: No rules yet. Add one to set constraints for the AI.

createSkill.title: New Skill
createSkill.contentPlaceholder: Describe what this skill teaches the AI...

ruleCard.noFilePatternsAllFiles: No file patterns — applies to all files

createRule.title: New Rule
createRule.contentPlaceholder: Describe the rule the AI should follow...

context.title: Knowledge (.doable/)
context.description: Knowledge files guide the AI's behavior when editing your project. Each file serves a different purpose.

masterToggle.title: Doable AI for this project
masterToggle.description: When disabled, /__doable/ai/* returns 503 AI_DISABLED_FOR_PROJECT. Useful for paused projects or quota lockouts.

thinkingVisibility.title: Thinking content visibility
thinkingVisibility.description: How reasoning blocks (<think>, <reasoning>, <plan>…) are rendered in the generated chatbot UI.

auto.label: Auto (collapsed)
auto.description: Render inside a 💭 Thinking disclosure, collapsed by default.

alwaysShow.label: Always show
alwaysShow.description: Render reasoning inline above the answer.

hide.label: Hide entirely
hide.description: Strip <think> blocks server-side. The app never sees them.

systemPrompt.title: System prompt override
systemPrompt.description: Prepended to every runtime chat call. Visible to the model only — never echoed to the client. Up to 4 KB.
systemPrompt.placeholder: e.g. You always answer in haiku.
systemPrompt.charCount: {current} / {max} chars ({percent}%) — extra content beyond the cap is truncated client-side.

chatModel.title: Chat model override
chatModel.description: Overrides the workspace-resolved chat model for runtime chat in this project's generated app.

embeddingModel.title: Embedding model override (destructive)
embeddingModel.description: Changing the embedding model permanently erases all existing embeddings for this project because pgvector column dimensions are fixed per model.
embeddingModel.hint: Click below to walk through the destructive confirmation.

usage.title: Runtime token usage
usage.description: Aggregates of ai_usage_log rows for this project, grouped by mode.

eraseModal.title: Erase embeddings for this project?
eraseModal.description: Changing the embedding model will permanently DELETE all existing embedding rows for this project (current model: {model}, {rows} rows across {tables} table(s)).

chatModelPicker.inheritDescription: Use the model configured in AI Settings for this workspace.
chatModelPicker.overrideDescription: Pick a provider and model from your workspace catalog.
chatModelPicker.noProviders: No workspace providers configured. Add one in AI Settings.
chatModelPicker.noModelsDiscovered: No models discovered yet. Click Refresh or check the provider in AI Settings.
chatModelPicker.currentOverride: Current saved override: {model} — pick a model above to update it.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Manage authentication keys for published apps. Auto-provisioned on first publish with tool-scoping and origin-binding.
apiKeys.saveKeyWarning: Save this key — it won't be shown again
apiKeys.empty: No API keys yet. Keys are auto-provisioned on first publish, or you can create one manually below.
apiKeys.toolsAllowed: {count, plural, one {# tool allowed} other {# tools allowed}}

explanation.clientKeys: Client keys (dpk_c_*): For browser apps. Origin-bound, lower rate limits (600/min).
explanation.serverKeys: Server keys (dpk_s_*): For backend apps. No origin check, higher rate limits (1200/min).
explanation.autoProvisioned: Auto-provisioned: When you publish, a client key is automatically created and scoped to exactly the MCP tools your app uses.

toasts.created: API key created — copy it now, it won't be shown again

rateLimiting.title: Rate Limiting
rateLimiting.description: Control how many MCP tool calls and integration requests this project can make per minute.

systemDefault.label: System Default
systemDefault.description: 600 calls/min for preview, 1200 calls/min for published apps with API keys

custom.label: Custom Limit
custom.description: Set a specific calls-per-minute limit for this project

unlimited.label: Unlimited (No Rate Limiting)
unlimited.description: Disable rate limiting entirely. Use with caution — external MCP servers may still apply their own limits.

toasts.loadFailed: Failed to load rate limit settings

rateLimitingTab.title: MCP & Integration Rate Limiting
rateLimitingTab.description: Control how many MCP tool calls and integration requests this project can make per minute. Applies to all modes: preview, standalone, and published.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.paragraph1: Rate limiting applies to all MCP tool calls and integration actions made by this project, regardless of how the app is accessed (editor preview, standalone URL, or published site).
howItWorks.paragraph2: All requests flow through a single endpoint: /__doable/connector-proxy/mcp/:toolName

bullets.previewAuth: Preview & standalone: authenticated via short-lived JWT (15 min)
bullets.publishedAuth: Published apps: authenticated via project API key (dpk_*)
bullets.sharedLimit: Rate limit is shared across all auth modes for this project

default.title: Default Domain
default.description: Your project is always accessible at its .doable.me subdomain.

custom.title: Custom Domain
custom.description: Serve your published site from your own domain name.

proFeature.title: Pro+ Feature
proFeature.description: Custom domains are available on the Pro plan and above. Upgrade your workspace to connect your own domain.

custom.empty: No custom domains configured. Add one above to get started.

configureDns.title: Configure DNS
configureDns.description: Add this CNAME record in your Cloudflare DNS dashboard with the proxy (orange cloud) enabled.
configureDns.name: Name
configureDns.hint: Your domain must be on Cloudflare DNS (free). The CNAME must be proxied (orange cloud ON). After adding the record, click Verify above.

active.title: Domain Active — SSL and routing configured via Cloudflare
active.description: HTTPS certificate managed by Cloudflare. Auto-renews.

toasts.added: Domain {domain} added. Configure your DNS records below.

projectEnvironment.title: Project Environment
projectEnvironment.description: Override the workspace default environment for this project. The AI will use this environment's skills, rules, knowledge, and connectors.
projectEnvironment.noEnvironments: No environments in this workspace yet. Create one from the Environments panel.
projectEnvironment.overrideActive: This project uses a custom environment override. The workspace default is bypassed.
projectEnvironment.inheritingDefault: Inheriting from workspace default. Select an environment above to override.

presets.title: Environment Presets
presets.description: Reusable bundles of skills, instructions, MCPs, and integrations applied to this workspace.
presets.emptyDescription: Create environment presets from the editor's Environments panel.

deployment.title: Deployment
deployment.description: Deployment environments for publishing your project.

production.name: Production
production.description: Live site accessible to all visitors

preview.name: Preview
preview.description: Test changes before publishing to production

transfer.title: Transfer Project
transfer.description: Transfer this project to another workspace. The project will be moved along with all its files, settings, and deployment history.
transfer.toast: Transfer request sent. The recipient will receive an email to accept.

delete.title: Delete Project
delete.description: Permanently delete this project and all its deployments, files, and data. This action cannot be undone.
delete.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete {projectName} and all associated data. Type the project name below to confirm.
